overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a sunlit tribal village with wooden and stone architecture. The character walks along irrigation channels, crosses a wooden bridge, passes through a courtyard tavern with dining NPCs, and continues toward a large village gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path alongside stone irrigation channel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside a stone water channel, heading toward a wooden bridge

entered.detail: stone-lined water channel with flowing water running parallel to the path
rustic wooden structure with thatched roof and hanging vine decorations
small wooden plank bridge crossing the water channel ahead
low stone wall bordering the water channel with moss and grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path next to a stone irrigation channel in a tribal village. Wooden buildings line the left side while the water channel runs along the right, with a wooden footbridge visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge crossing and village square entrance

events.description: character stops walking on the bridge to look up at the sky and surroundings
crosses the wooden bridge over the water channel into the open village area

agents.ego_description: pauses on the wooden bridge to look up at the sky and scan the environment before continuing forward

entered.detail: narrow wooden footbridge with weathered planks crossing the water channel
open area with scattered tribal buildings and smoke rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wooden plank bridge over the water channel and pauses to look around at the village square opening up ahead, with blue sky visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor tavern courtyard with dining tables and cooking area

events.description: enters the walled courtyard through a stone archway
passes by NPCs eating at wooden tables with food and drink containers

agents.ego_description: walks into the courtyard tavern area, passing close to NPCs seated at wooden tables eating and drinking

notable_agents.action: bald male villager sitting at wooden table eating food from a plate
cook tending to a smoking fire pit with roasting meat on a spit

entered.detail: tall stone walls enclosing the courtyard with an arched stone entranceway
rustic wooden tables with benches, clay plates, and drink containers
smoking fire pit with meat roasting on a metal spit frame
stone entranceway with wooden doors leading into the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character enters a walled courtyard tavern through a stone archway, walking past NPCs seated at wooden tables eating and drinking. A cooking fire with roasting meat burns to the left as the character moves through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: main village thoroughfare with tribal architecture and gate

events.description: exits the courtyard back into the open village main street
continues walking toward a large wooden gate structure at the end of the path

agents.ego_description: walks along the main village path passing other pedestrians and approaching a large wooden tribal gate

notable_agents.action: bald male villager walking past the character in the opposite direction
villager walking ahead toward the large gate structure

entered.detail: tall tribal wooden gate structure with stairs leading up to it and carved decorations
elevated wooden tower structure with thatched roof overlooking the village
wooden stalls with fabric canopies and goods displayed
tall palm trees scattered throughout the village square

segments.scene_description: Exiting the courtyard, the character walks along the main village thoroughfare toward a large wooden gate. Palm trees and tribal buildings line the path, with other villagers walking about and a watchtower visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a tribal village, transitioning from a quiet irrigation path into a bustling communal hub and finally toward the village exit. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path flanked by wooden buildings and a stone irrigation channel, moving steadily toward a wooden footbridge. As the character crosses the bridge, the view opens up into a bright village square under a clear blue sky before shifting inward through a stone archway. The scene then enters a walled courtyard tavern, passing by NPCs at wooden tables and a roasting cooking fire, before exiting back into the open air. Finally, the camera follows the character along the main thoroughfare past palm trees and a watchtower, heading toward a large wooden gate as other villagers move about the path.
